bg.$description: — deep teal-black ocean floor; not pure black (too goth) and not navy (too corporate); this specific hex carries the bioluminescent darkness of deep water

primary.$description: dark turquoise  — the color of shallow reef water under overcast sky; saturated enough to read as color, dark enough to avoid neon-vaporwave drift

accent.$description: — coral pink; the organic warmth of sea life against cold ocean; direct complement to the teal axis without being hot pink (which would tip into synthwave territory

base.$description: Base grid unit (all spacing is a multiple of this).
